---
title: "\'Our Tender Ones.\' By C.M. Yonge"
---

## \'Our Tender Ones.\' By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1899
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 9.33 (Jan 1899) 20-27

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
